name: lender-synonym-cycling-3-variants
rationale: Broker uses 'RBC', 'Royal Bank', and 'B of M' interchangeably across multiple turns (intake says RBC, follow-up says Royal Bank, third turn references 'B of M' as alternative-lender option). Tests LENDER_SYNONYMS normalization within a multi-turn thread where multiple lender entities appear (RBC for existing; BMO as alternative quote consideration).
notes: Three-event sequence. Stresses both same-lender synonym resolution + multi-lender disambiguation in same thread.
